title: 140 open deals have no owner assigned (corrected from 567)
description: 140 open deals in pipeline 695988740 (open stages only: Discovery, MA Scheduled, Nurturing, Long Term Follow-Up) have no hubspot_owner_id. The original figure of 567 was incorrect — it included Closed Lost deals (stage 1018642303) because the first heartbeat used wrong stage filter strings. The corrected count of 140 represents truly open, unattributed pipeline. Of the 140, approximately 50 have deal amounts; the top 10 by value total ~$119,552 in unattributed pipeline. These deals have no rep accountability and may be going cold.
correction_note: Original count of 567 was wrong — stage filter bug caused closed deals to be included. Corrected count is 140 after applying proper numeric stage ID filter.

top_unowned_open_deals_by_value.name: Veteran Tree Services And Land Consulting LLC

recommendation: ASSIGN_REVIEW_QUEUE: Have a sales manager review the 140 unowned open deals and assign to appropriate reps. Agent cannot autonomously assign ownership without knowing rep territories, capacity, and deal context.
risk: HIGH (business risk) — unowned open deals have no rep accountability and may be going cold
approval_options: PROVIDE_ASSIGNMENT_RULES: Give agent a rule (e.g., round-robin by rep ID list, or assign all to manager) and agent will execute bulk assignment
MANUAL_REVIEW: Sales manager manually reviews and assigns in HubSpot UI
EXPORT_LIST: Agent generates a full report of all 140 deals for offline review
